ideal_must_detect.matched_text: CAC Standard Contract for Outbound Transfer of Personal Information
cross‑border impact assessment (跨境影响评估)
two trading days after publication of the periodic report

MNPI examples include preliminary unaudited H1 results showing >15% variance to guidance, an undisclosed key supplier contract draft, or a board‑approved but unannounced equity incentive plan; non‑MNPI includes cafeteria menu updates and routine IT vendor maintenance windows.
